title: Dravis

{{Quote|I don't think he's ever been on time for anything in his whole life.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], about Dravis|<ref name="Heir to the Empire">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Dravis''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], and the chief [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] kingpin [[Billey]]. His father was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the elite [[Scimitar assault wing]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|He is our local boy, Dravis. He'a a bit of a scoundrel, but he'll teach you to fly just fine.|[[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FtSpt" />}}
After he graduated from the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], it was rumored that Dravis stole a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and fled to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] to avoid supporting a child he had fathered.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>

During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Dravis was one of the smugglers in [[Talon Karrde]]'s early version of [[Smugglers' Alliance]]. He operated out of the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and tasked another Smugglers' Alliance pilot with a series of missions. These missions involved defending the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and securing shipments from [[Commerce Raiders]] and other aggressive entities.<ref name="SWG:JTL" />

[[File:DravisKrayt.jpg|left|thumb|Dravis' M22-T]]
Later, Dravis agreed to grant passage for a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[entertainer]] named [[Ex]] and a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] named [[Sh'ira]] to the city of [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] for 100,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. After Ex [[Death/Legends|killed]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] outside the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley Spaceport]] in anger, Ex and her friend were desperate to escape the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in order to evade arrest. After receiving payment, Dravis carried both individuals aboard his [[M22-T Krayt gunship]].<ref name="IE">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66841&resource=features|text=Imperial Entanglements}}</ref>

Dravis was also the friend of a more famous ex-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. When Han set out in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] to hire smugglers to help alleviate the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] shortfall of [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], it was Dravis that Han contacted first. Dravis gave Han the New Republic's first warning about [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], though he was unaware of the actual identity of the new Imperial leader. He also let Han know that the low-key [[Talon Karrde]] actually ran the largest smuggling organization in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Later, Dravis was assigned by Karrde to help track down Thrawn's secret [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|cloning facility]].

{{Char-stub}}
